3113640.name: Clairvoyance
3113640.description:
CLAIRVOYANCE

A love letter to the 2000s Flash Era, Clairvoyance is a tactical martial arts roguelike that stands on the shoulders of giants like XiaoXiao and ElectricMan 2.

SEIZE YOUR AGENCY

Who are you?

You are a test subject in a world where nothing is organic. Every "chance" encounter was staged. Every tragedy was scheduled. You were designed to be trained, studied, and disposed of. 

For years, you had this flickering sensation in your head, prodding at you with blurry feelings of deja vu and... warmth? The closer you came to discovering the truth of your world, the greater it became, until it was like a roaring fire. Until you shared in its mind, seeing what it sees. The future.

You are outnumbered and outgunned, but you have one advantage: you've seen their next moves before they've even thought of it. This, they could not have planned for. This is the first decision you will make.

It's time to express yourself.

REALISTIC COMBAT, SUPERNATURAL POWER

Clairvoyance features a grounded combat system inspired by real sparring. Footwork affects attack timing. Rolling with a punch can reduce damage. Different types of strikes have unique amounts of damage, reach, and risk.

This level of physical detail would be overwhelming in a traditional brawler. But in Clairvoyance, you're given foresight: a brief glimpse of where attacks will land before they happen. Reaction speed becomes secondary to positioning, precision, and timing with the knowledge of what's coming.

FREEDOM OF MOVEMENT

Forget rigid animations and simple hitboxes. In Clairvoyance, you're in control:

  • Tight hitboxes on every limb

  • Fully independent head movement

  • Mid-attack micro-adjustments

Combined, you can bob and weave around attacks like never before while simultaneously preparing your counterattack.

NATURALLY FLOWING ATTACKS

Every move has a start stance and an end stance. This creates a physical logic in combo creation and execution, and natural levels of "friction" in using one move after another.

INSPIRED FIGHTING STYLES

You can choose between a variety of fighting styles, each with unique movesets and passives inspired by their real life combat philosophies. The style you choose will define your approach to every fight.

ENDLESS POSSIBILITIES

-Highly customizable movesets

-Multiple weapon types

-Multiple characters, all with unique stats

-Powerful upgrades and items

highlighted.name: The road to mastery is long
